summary: Drop LIFO ship narrative from 2.memory.md; CHANGELOG indexed by memory recall replaces it. Keep Technical Decisions + Known Issues only.
description: After reviewer attack on initial refactor plan (Option D rename rejected, descriptionDetailed rejected via planner), shipped Option E: (1) CHANGELOG.json schema gains 3 optional fields — `summary` (≤200 char soft target for snapshot display; soft warn at 200, never reject), `references[]` (flat string array with prefix convention `commit:|file:|knowledge:|feature:|task:|url:` — no `note:` escape hatch), `supersedes` (optional pointer to prior entry this one reverses or replaces); (2) src/lib/recall.ts gains `'changelog'` as a CorpusType — each CHANGELOG entry becomes one indexed doc with body = summary + description + references. Without this, deleting LIFO from memory.md would have LOST recall coverage. (3) src/cli/commands/memory.ts: byType/counts records updated; memory status now shows changelog entry count. (4) src/cli/commands/core.ts: `core changelog add` accepts --type/--scope/--description/--summary/--references/--supersedes/--breaking flags (interactive prompts still work). (5) 2.memory.md restructured: LIFO ship-narrative section deleted; Technical Decisions + Known Issues retained per user override of reviewer's split-Known-Issues recommendation. (6) NO file rename (reviewer killed it: blast radius was 40 files not 18, doctor migration code was vapor, CORE_ALIASES hallucinated). Corpus grew 47→130 docs (added 82 CHANGELOG entries + 1 new memory archive knowledge file).

summary: Drop Sleep State section (UserPromptSubmit hook already delivers debt) and stop inlining Pinned Knowledge body; pinned files now surface at top of Knowledge Index with prominent warning.
description: src/cli/commands/snapshot.ts: (1) Sleep State block (debt + sessions + history) deleted because the UserPromptSubmit hook already injects `Sleep debt is X` every prompt — duplicate signal that bloated the snapshot. (2) Pinned Knowledge full-content inlining removed; pinned entries now appear at the TOP of Knowledge Index under a `> !!! ÇOK ÖNEMLİ !!! Kullanıcı bu bilgiyi pinlemiş — yapacağın bir işle ilişkisi varsa MUTLAKA OKU!` callout, marked with 📌, body fetched on demand via Read or memory recall. (3) Active task `Why:` cap raised 100→250 chars + HTML template comments stripped (template placeholders like `<!-- What problem does this solve? -->` no longer leak in). Same treatment applied to feature `Why:`. Snapshot shrank from ~700 → ~575 lines.

Tighten anti-bloat ceiling from ~300 lines to ~150 lines per core file (0.soul, 1.user, 2.memory). Sleep-state's Pass C C1 sweep now extracts at the new lower threshold. Rationale: with `dreamcontext memory recall` (BM25, default-on hook injection) in v0.4.0+, archived content stays findable on demand — the snapshot only needs the freshest, most-cited material always-loaded; everything else can live in knowledge files and surface via recall. Aggressive pruning is now preferred over generous retention. Current 2.memory.md is 285 lines — next sleep cycle will extract older LIFO sections to knowledge/. Files updated: agents/sleep-state.md (C1 heading + paragraph + rule #7), _dream_context/core/6.system_flow.md (Anti-bloat bullet).

Flip UserPromptSubmit hook memory-recall injection from opt-in to default-on (same-day decision reversal). Code: src/cli/commands/hook.ts user-prompt-submit handler now runs the injection unless DREAMCONTEXT_MEMORY_HOOK=0 (previously required =1). Existing safeguards retained: ≥8 char prompt, ≥2.0 top-hit score, try/catch never breaks user prompt flow. Docs propagated: PRD memory-recall-bm25.md, knowledge decision-mem0-vs-bm25-recall.md, 2.memory.md LIFO entry, 6.system_flow.md, skill/SKILL.md, README.md, DEEP-DIVE.md. Rationale: dogfood on the dreamcontext repo (47-doc corpus, score ≥2.0 filter, short-prompt skip) showed strong hits consistently surfaced relevant docs with negligible noise — the noise/utility tradeoff favoured always-on.

Add `dreamcontext memory` CLI namespace with deterministic BM25 recall over the curated corpus (Path A; no mem0). New subcommands: recall <query> [--top N] [--types knowledge,feature,task,memory] [--json|--plain], remember <text> [--title] [--tasks], update <slug> [--description|--tags|--content|--append|--pin|--unpin], delete <slug> [--force], list [--types ...], status. New src/lib/recall.ts (corpus loader + light TR/EN tokenizer + BM25 scorer k1=1.5/b=0.75 + snippet extractor). New src/cli/commands/memory.ts. Registered in src/cli/index.ts. UserPromptSubmit hook (src/cli/commands/hook.ts) extended with opt-in recall injection gated by DREAMCONTEXT_MEMORY_HOOK=1 env var (off by default; top-3 hits with score ≥2.0 only). Zero new npm dependencies. PRD at _dream_context/core/features/memory-recall-bm25.md (in_review). 20-query benchmark on dreamcontext repo's 44-doc corpus: 94.7% top-1, 100% top-5. Cold start <100ms. Explicit rejection of mem0 after 3 parallel adversarial reviewers (critic+pragmatist+security) converged on 5 issue categories: Python+Ollama cliff, determinism tier leakage, sleep-finalizer reversing 5→3 collapse, mem0 LLM-extraction non-determinism+unreliable-dedup, 5 critical security blockers (embedding inversion, redaction order, rebase data loss, crash recovery, OpenAI exfil-by-config).

Propagate memory namespace through all documentation surfaces. skill/SKILL.md: new H2 section 'Memory Recall (BM25)' + new operational rule #14 'Recall before grep' + 6 new Command Reference table rows. agents/dreamcontext-explore.md: new prominent Step 0 'Recall FIRST before Glob/Grep/Read' + new Rule #2. agents/dreamcontext-initializer.md: closing tip mentioning recall is immediately usable post-init. agents/sleep-tasks.md + agents/sleep-state.md + agents/sleep-product.md: surgical dedup-pre-check pointers and CLI-shortcut notes per specialist domain (no responsibility changes). README.md: new Memory Recall section + Commands subsection with full surface. DEEP-DIVE.md: ~90 lines covering BM25-over-mem0 rationale (steel-manned reviewer rejection) + corpus layout + command surface table + 3 new Design Tradeoffs rows. AGENTS.md: 1-line in managed system-instructions block making memory recall agents' first-line lookup before Glob/Grep. All edits surgical, no existing content removed.

Add manifest system and setup command for reliable install/update tracking. New src/lib/manifest.ts defines the Manifest type (version, createdAt, updatedAt, platforms, files: Record<path,{version,kind}>, packs: Record<name,{version}>) with helpers read/write/diff/recordFile/recordPack/dreamcontextVersion/isSafeDeletePath. New src/lib/setup-config.ts owns _dream_context/state/.config.json (platforms, packs, multiProduct, setupVersion). New src/cli/commands/setup.ts provides a one-shot init + install-skill + install-instructions flow with flags --defaults, --multi-product, --platforms, --packs, --yes. update.ts rewritten: reads old manifest, runs install recording new state, diffs, prunes stale system-managed files inside .claude/.agents/.codex/ with user confirmation. First-run-after-migration detects but does not delete (safe upgrade path). Manifest written after prune so cancelled prune re-offers next run. Deprecation warnings added to init/install-skill/install-instructions/install-claude-md; suppressed under DREAMCONTEXT_SETUP_INTERNAL=1 when setup invokes them. First live run on this repo: 0.2.0 baseline bootstrapped, 44 system files tracked, claude+codex platforms, 4 stale brand-voice agents pruned.

Add multi-product support across init, snapshot, and data-structures layout. init.ts gains monorepo prompt and --multi-product flag; creates per-product data-structures/<product>.md files and seeds knowledge/products/ stubs. snapshot.ts adds getActiveProductKnowledge: reads .config.json multiProduct list, resolves active task via .active-task override or mtime-sorted in_progress tasks, injects matching knowledge/products/<product>.md into snapshot under an 'Active Product Knowledge: <name>' section (capped 200 lines with read-full pointer); null-safe for legacy projects without .config.json. Template src/templates/init/5.data_structures.sql deleted; replaced by src/templates/init/data-structures/default.md as the canonical single-product schema template. doctor.ts gains checkDataStructures: validates new data-structures/ directory, warns on legacy file presence with migration hint. SKILL.md gains Multi-Product Binding section describing auto-injection and per-product knowledge/data-structures layout.

Refine sleep specialist prompts with B0a/B0b recurrence gate split and broadened PRD creation trigger. sleep-state.md: B0a two-observation gate retained for 1.user.md and 2.memory.md (preferences and decisions); new B0b single-observation gate added for 3.style_guide, 4.tech_stack, core/data-structures/*, 6.system_flow (code reality files that should track shipped changes immediately); B1 priority row removed (priority is volatile user intent, not soul material); B2 legacy migration block added for 5.data_structures.sql -> data-structures/ transition. sleep-product.md: A4 PRD creation trigger broadened from 'shipped buildable concept' to three OR conditions: (a) concept has >= 2 acceptance criteria, (b) user named it as a feature, (c) task has dangling feature: frontmatter pointing to missing PRD; Acceptance Criteria section may be empty placeholder on first creation; A5 multi-product awareness added; B5 per-product knowledge stub bootstrapping. Both agent files mirrored to agents/ and .codex/agents/prompts/.

Fix three race conditions and edge cases in dashboard task management. usePersistedState: projectId hydration timing fixed (no writes until projectId ready; on projectId change, snap to default then re-read; multi-tab migration race-safe). TaskDetailPanel: pendingBodyRef pattern for race-free rapid checkbox toggles so in-flight PATCH requests do not clobber each other; refs for updateTask/onMutationError eliminate stale closure bugs. src/server/routes/tasks.ts: PATCH body capped at 1 MB to prevent unbounded request processing; --- first-line sanitization prevents frontmatter injection.

Add flowchart-to-criterion sync in TaskDetailPanel. HTML comment convention <!-- node:<id> --> links acceptance criteria checkboxes to mermaid flowchart nodes; toggling a checkbox updates the matching node class (done/active/todo/blocked) in the mermaid source and re-renders the SVG in place. Mermaid edge-line corruption fix: arrow lines and non-node-def lines are skipped during node-class patching; node-def regex is anchored to avoid false matches on label text. useTasks hook updated to surface mutation error state.

Linear Midnight design system overhaul on dashboard CSS (scope creep in WS-4, confirmed non-breaking by holistic reviewer). Design token sweep across tokens.css, global.css, Header.css, Sidebar.css, Shell.css and all component CSS files: replaced purple-magenta brand gradient with Linear's Midnight palette (pitch-black base, neon-lime accent --color-accent, aether-blue syntax highlight); glassmorphism surfaces flattened to solid layered backgrounds; Inter variable font added via Google Fonts CDN with font-weight 510/590 (graceful fallback to 500/600 if not loaded); 193 token reference changes across 22 files. Legacy --glass-* and --color-brand-* variables preserved for backward compatibility. Build: 4.89s.

Update dreamcontext-explore and dreamcontext-initializer agent prompts to stop referencing legacy 5.data_structures.sql; now point to core/data-structures/<product>.md (or default.md for single-product projects). Both files mirrored to agents/ and .codex/agents/prompts/ and their .toml configs bumped.

Collapse 5-specialist sleep fan-out into 3 specialists (sleep-state, sleep-product, sleep-tasks). sleep-core and sleep-changelog merged into sleep-state, which now owns core files 0-6, CHANGELOG.json, RELEASES.json, and triggers; sleep-knowledge and sleep-features merged into sleep-product, which owns knowledge/ and feature PRDs. sleep-tasks is unchanged. Motivation: parallel agents help wall-clock only to the slowest (sleep-tasks); the other four had significant launch + synthesis overhead without proportional benefit. Non-overlapping file domains preserve the no-stomp guarantee. Implementation: 4 old agent files deleted from agents/, .codex/agents/prompts/, .claude/agents/, plus 4 .toml config files from .codex/agents/; sleep-state.md and sleep-product.md created and mirrored to all 4 locations. hook.ts debt-prompt strings updated (3 occurrences). AGENTS.md, src/templates/AGENTS.md, src/templates/CLAUDE.md sub-agents tables updated. SKILL.md fan-out section rewritten. 0.soul.md lines 11+19 updated to describe 3 specialists. Reviewer found 2 MAJOR issues (over-fire wording in SKILL.md:306 + stale '5 specialists' count in soul.md:19) — both fixed. Third stale mirror (.claude/skills/dreamcontext/SKILL.md) was an older revision missing RICE sections — fully synced to canonical. Build passed: dashboard 5.16s, CLI tsup ESM 503KB.

Codify proactive skill triage as a hard rule and backfill skill declarations across all agents. SKILL.md gains new rule #2 — 'Skill triage before action — HARD RULE': before drafting content, writing code, or delegating to a sub-agent, the agent MUST scan the available-skills list, match task keywords to skill descriptions, and invoke Skill for each match. Includes 9 common task→skill trigger mappings (UI/design, Meta ads, growth, brand voice, council, codebase review, Claude API, system prompts, video). Existing rules 2-12 renumbered to 3-13. All 10 agent files (dreamcontext-explore, dreamcontext-initializer, dreamcontext-rem-sleep, council-persona, council-synthesizer, discover-brand, reviewer, marketing-creative, marketing-monitor, marketing-strategy) now declare required skills in frontmatter skills: array and a '## Skills always loaded' body section. 743/743 tests passing (commit d293d93).

Add vision pass on hook frames (meta-marketing PR 5). Behind env-key flag (OPENAI_VISION_API_KEY > GOOGLE_API_KEY fallback): tags each hook frame at t={0,1,2,3}s with pattern labels from a fixed allowlist — face-zoom, talking-head, text-only, prop-driven, group-shot, environment, pattern-interrupt, b-roll. YouTube ingest is transcript-only (no-op for existing corpus); runs on Instagram videos only. Key new code: src/lib/marketing/vision.ts (300L — pickVisionProvider, parseLabelsFromText with allowlist filter + dedup + 2-cap + code-fence tolerance, labelHookFrame for OpenAI gpt-4o-mini and Google gemini-1.5-flash with injectable fetcher, runVisionPassOnPost with atomic JSON+MD bridge update, updatePatternTagsInBridge). src/lib/marketing/competitors.ts fires vision pass after persistPost and awaits all in-flight tasks before exiting (commit 3c2b2d2).

Add mk council command and 4 marketing council personas (meta-marketing PR 8a + 8b). Personas live as data files in skill-packs/meta-marketing/council-personas/*.md — strategy-optimizer, performance-monitor, creative-director, risk-officer — each with frontmatter (slug, model, aspects, skills) + '## Skills always loaded' body section grounded in corpus rules. New lib: src/lib/marketing/council-personas.ts (findPersonasDir, parsePersonaFile, loadAllPersonas, selectPersonas). New CLI command src/cli/commands/marketing/council.ts: mk council "<topic>" re-invokes dreamcontext council create then council agent create per persona via spawnSync (stdin body to avoid shell-escape issues). Pre-commit binary guard also shipped in PR 8a: hooks/marketing-binary-guard.sh blocks commits of assets/_media paths; mk hooks install writes the .git/hooks/pre-commit launcher. src/lib/marketing/git-guard.ts provides pure functions (isBlockedMarketingPath, findBlockedPaths, getStagedFiles). 743/743 tests passing after both PRs (commits ac56e53, a8966d7).

Remove the dreamcontext-rem-sleep serial fallback agent entirely. The refactor/rem-sleep entry earlier this cycle rewrote it as an explicit fallback; the sleep-fanout-architecture cleanup session then concluded one path with no fallback is cleaner — the fallback creates ambiguity and maintenance overhead. agents/dreamcontext-rem-sleep.md and .codex/agents/prompts/dreamcontext-rem-sleep.md deleted. The five specialist agents (sleep-tasks, sleep-changelog, sleep-core, sleep-knowledge, sleep-features) are now the only sleep implementation. Main-agent SKILL.md fan-out flow is the canonical and only path.

Sleep fan-out architecture: orchestration moves from a single rem-sleep agent into the main agent, which dispatches 5 specialist sub-agents in parallel — sleep-tasks, sleep-changelog, sleep-core, sleep-knowledge, sleep-features. SKILL.md Sleep section now spells out the full flow (sleep start, build brief inline from .sleep.json + git, parallel Agent dispatch with always-fire vs conditional-fire rules for knowledge/features, marketing pass, council promote check, sleep done). Each specialist owns one domain (no overlapping writes), distills its own transcripts, and returns a short structured report. New agent files: agents/sleep-tasks.md, sleep-changelog.md, sleep-core.md, sleep-knowledge.md, sleep-features.md. The original dreamcontext-rem-sleep agent is retained as a serial fallback path for environments where main-agent fan-out isn't possible.

Rewrite agents/dreamcontext-rem-sleep.md as the explicit fallback path. Description, role intro, and protocol now state up front that fan-out from the main agent is the preferred flow; this single agent only runs when fan-out is unavailable, in which case it serializes the same five domains. Trimmed from ~412 lines to ~182 by removing duplicated explanations now centralized in SKILL.md and the per-specialist agent files.

Multi-platform installer: dreamcontext now installs to Claude Code AND Codex CLI from one source of truth. New src/lib/platforms.ts (PLATFORM_CATALOG, parsePlatformList, ensurePlatformSelection, formatSupportedPlatforms) and src/lib/platform-defaults.ts (state/.platforms.json read/write). install-skill mirrors agents into .codex/agents/*.toml + prompts/*.md and writes Codex hooks (SessionStart, Stop, UserPromptSubmit, PostToolUse) without Claude-specific bits (SubagentStart, PreCompact, agent-gating PreToolUse). New install-instructions command writes managed root files for the selected platforms (CLAUDE.md and/or AGENTS.md); install-claude-md kept as a legacy alias. New AGENTS.md template at src/templates/AGENTS.md. Doctor checks state/.platforms.json when present.

Add `dreamcontext update` command (src/cli/commands/update.ts): refreshes installed skill, agents, hooks, packs, and root instructions in place for all configured platforms. Help groups in src/cli/index.ts reorganized — install-skill / install-instructions / update / install-claude-md (legacy) — and `hook` description generalized to 'used by platform integrations'. Interactive menu (src/cli/interactive.ts) gains a multiselect arg type for platform pickers backed by PLATFORM_CATALOG.

Add active planning version state. New src/lib/active-version.ts plus state/.active-version.json track which planning version new tasks auto-attach to. `dreamcontext core releases active` prints, switches (`active <ver>`), or clears (`--clear`) the active planning version. `releases add --status planning` auto-activates only when no active version is set, to avoid clobbering an intentional choice. Tasks created without --version auto-attach to the active planning version (via getActivePlanningVersion in tasks.ts), so new work is always linked to a milestone.

Task model overhaul. (1) RICE prioritization: new src/lib/rice.ts (RiceFields, normalizeRice, validateRiceInput, mergeRice, computeScore = reach × impact × confidence ÷ effort) wired into tasks create/update with reach/impact/confidence/effort flags. (2) Workflow flowchart: every task template now starts with a `## Workflow` mermaid block — one node per acceptance criterion grouped under milestone subgraphs, status classes done/active/todo/blocked. (3) `dreamcontext tasks doctor <name>` validates that flowchart node count matches acceptance-criteria count and that statuses are in sync. (4) New `dreamcontext tasks status <name> <todo|in_progress|in_review|completed>` command. (5) Task template body rewritten to current-truth voice with explicit per-section guidance (Why, User Stories, Acceptance Criteria, Constraints, Technical Details, Notes). New tests: tests/unit/rice.test.ts, tests/unit/tasks-doctor.test.ts.

Pinned-knowledge preview cap. extractPinnedPreview() in src/cli/commands/snapshot.ts caps each pinned file inlined into the auto-context snapshot at DEFAULT_PINNED_PREVIEW_LINES (60), with per-entry overrides via frontmatter `pinned_preview_lines: N` or `pinned_preview: "all"`. Frontmatter is stripped before counting; markdown structure is preserved (no paragraph joining). Prevents one huge pinned file from blowing the snapshot budget while still making knowledge zero-tool-call accessible.

Render task Workflow flowcharts inline. TaskDetailPanel.tsx now initializes mermaid (theme-matched to prefers-color-scheme, securityLevel:strict, htmlLabels) and uses panzoom for the rendered diagram; unquoted node labels are auto-quoted before parse to handle brackets/regex chars in criterion text. New TaskDetailPanel.css adds workflow viewer styling (105 lines added). Shell.tsx now persists the active page to localStorage under dreamcontext.dashboard.activePage so reloads land on the user's last view (Brain default for first run). useTasks.ts gains supporting hook updates. dashboard/package.json adds mermaid + panzoom deps.

Make the meta-marketing skill pack project-agnostic. SKILL.md role no longer hardcodes Tilki Öğretmen; the calling project supplies offer/ICP/geography/budget. Pre-launch checklist gains 2026-current guardrails: Special Ad Categories as a hard block (wrong setting = ad-account disapproval, not just rejected ads), legal-minimum age rule, auto-translate off unless fulfillable, audience-breakdown segmentation (define for reporting + exclusions, not adset fragmentation — Meta mixes anyway), hard-exclude existing customers from prospecting, optional value rules instead of narrow targeting. Adset structure now aims for 20+ ads/adset under Andromeda. creative-frameworks.md, copy-formulas.md, mistakes.md, api-reference.md, platform-state.md, council-personas/risk-officer.md updated to remove project-specific examples. Marketing agents (creative/monitor/strategy) and skill-packs catalog refreshed to match.

SKILL.md updates beyond the sleep section: new rule 12a — keep the per-task Workflow mermaid flowchart in sync with checkbox state, run `dreamcontext tasks doctor` to verify. Status convention spelled out: `todo -> in_progress -> in_review -> completed`; sleep agent bumps to `in_review` only, never auto-completes (user verifies). Releases section documents `releases active`/`active <ver>`/`active --clear` and the auto-attach behavior for new tasks.

Six new state task files capture in-flight work the fan-out architecture depends on: sleep-fanout-architecture (in_review — this redesign), rice-prioritization (todo — RICE rollout to dashboard + report views), plan-mode-to-task-import (todo — convert ~/.claude/plans/<slug>.md into dreamcontext tasks), marketing-dashboard-v0 (todo — marketing-specific dashboard view), meta-mcp-migration (todo — adopt Meta's official MCP server, 29 tools, OAuth via Meta Business), snapshot-pinned-preview (closed — implemented this cycle).

Refresh core identity files for the fan-out era. 0.soul.md trimmed (10-line delta) to remove single-agent rem-sleep wording. 2.memory.md compacted by ~165 lines (LIFO trim of stale operational details now living in feature PRDs and knowledge files). New knowledge files: technical-decisions-archive.md (granular dashboard/skill-packs/council/infra decisions from 2026-03 through 2026-04), decision-should-we-adopt-the-meta-marketing-skill-plan-... (council outcome). README updates explain the new fan-out flow.

New test coverage for the multi-platform installer and task model: tests/integration/platform-install.test.ts (codex mirror correctness), tests/unit/platforms.test.ts (catalog + parse helpers), tests/unit/platform-defaults.test.ts (state/.platforms.json round-trip), tests/unit/rice.test.ts (score arithmetic + validation), tests/unit/tasks-doctor.test.ts (workflow-vs-criteria sync). Existing snapshot/knowledge-index/snapshot-helpers tests updated for pinned-preview cap and new index shape.

skill-packs CLI Phase 2: install-skill extended with --packs (interactive @inquirer/prompts checkbox browser or direct pack names), --skill <pack> <skill> (individual sub-skill install), --list (catalog discovery). Cross-pack dependency warnings. Related agents copied to .claude/agents/. Firebase reference directories copied intact. alwaysApply:true shown as badge. Base install-skill hints about available packs post-install. 'Install skill packs' and 'List skill packs' added to interactive Setup menu. 17 new integration tests, 490 total passing. README + DEEP-DIVE updated.
Remove 7 duplicate agentcontext hooks that remained registered after rebrand to dreamcontext. Old hooks were failing on every Claude Code event since the agentcontext binary no longer exists.

scope: package.json, src/, agents/, skill/, skill-packs/, dashboard/, tests/, README.md, CHANGELOG.md, DEEP-DIVE.md, _dream_context/
description: Rebrand from agentcontext to dreamcontext. Package name: agentcontext -> dreamcontext. CLI binary: agentcontext -> dreamcontext. GitHub repo and local folder renamed accordingly. Agent files renamed: agentcontext-explore.md -> dreamcontext-explore.md, agentcontext-initializer.md -> dreamcontext-initializer.md, agentcontext-rem-sleep.md -> dreamcontext-rem-sleep.md. Context directory renamed: _agent_context/ -> _dream_context/. All code, tests, skill/SKILL.md, agent files, dashboard, README, CHANGELOG, DEEP-DIVE updated. Sleeping cat image added (public/image/dreamcontext.png). Banner script updated. 473 tests passing.

Add optional skill-packs distribution system (Phase 1+2 complete). 5 packs: engineering (coding-principles base + backend-principles, web-app-frontend, firebase-cloud-functions, firebase-firestore sub-skills), design (design-principles base + frontend-principles, design-web, design-mobile, onboarding-design), growth (app-growth base + performance-marketing, lean-analytics-experiments, lean-analytics-metrics), brand-voice (enforcement base + discover-brand, guideline-generation + 6 ref files), system-prompts (standalone). 6 optional agents in skill-packs/agents/ (reviewer, discover-brand, document-analysis, conversation-analysis, content-generation, quality-assurance). catalog.json manifest. Agents separated from skills with top-level agents array and pack relatedAgents links. Build pipeline ships skill-packs/ to dist/skill-packs/ via tsup cpSync. 42 files. 473 tests passing.

Prevent duplicate sleep agent dispatch when consolidation already in progress. Added sleep_started_at guard to getConsolidationDirective() and user-prompt-submit hook. When sleep is active: returns 'Do NOT dispatch another sleep agent' if debt>=4, silent if debt<4. 4 new integration tests, 473 total passing.

Rewrite dreamcontext-explore agent (105->78 lines). New philosophy: briefing-first with hypothesis-driven search. Budget caps per thoroughness level (Quick 1-3, Medium 4-8, Thorough 9-20 tool calls). Track A (documented knowledge, read one file) / Track B (find code, Glob->Grep->Read) / Track C (reusable component check) routing. Proactive Reusable output section flags existing components before the caller builds from scratch.

Add rule #12 'Reuse before create': before building any UI component, utility, hook, or abstraction, search for existing implementations via dreamcontext-explore. Prevents duplicating existing components.

Add in_review status: 4th Kanban column (purple) with workflow todo->in_progress->in_review->completed. In-review tasks treated as active (shown in snapshot, default tasks list, Eisenhower Matrix). 12 files changed, 469 tests passing.

Versions unified with Releases: deleted VERSIONS.json system and src/server/routes/versions.ts. Extended ReleaseEntry with optional status: 'planning' | 'released' field (backward compat — entries without status treated as released). CLI 'core releases add --status planning' creates planning-stage versions. Snapshot 'Upcoming Versions' section shows planning releases separately from 'Latest Release'. VersionManager redesigned: full-width 680px modal, stats header, planning/released sections, Release button to promote planning entries. SKILL.md Versioning section added. rem-sleep agent updated with Step 5b (Version Readiness Check) and version in decision tree.

Eisenhower Matrix view: 2×2 priority×urgency grid (Do First, Schedule, Delegate, Don't Do quadrants). Excludes completed tasks. Axis labels, quadrant color tokens. Accessible via viewMode toggle in TaskFilters.

MultiSelectFilter with type-ahead search: checkbox-based multi-select with search input that shows when >5 options. All/None toggle. Used for status, priority, urgency, tags, version filters in Kanban.

Kanban sub-grouping and extended views: SubGroupSection (collapsible nested sections with chevron/dot/count), group-by-tags (tasks appear in each applicable tag column), group-by-version, group-by-urgency. urgency field (critical/high/medium/low) and version field added to TaskData, CreateTaskInput, UpdateTaskInput, CLI tasks create --urgency and --version flags.

File/Preview tab toggle added to Core, Knowledge, and Features pages: MarkdownPreview component renders markdown as HTML (via marked), JsonPreview renders formatted JSON. Consistent File/Preview tab pattern across all content pages.

Task slug extraction regex tightened: was matching task names in prose text (false positives from reading transcripts). Now only matches within JSON command/file_path values using context-specific patterns — regex anchored to '"command":"..."' and '"file_path":"..."' JSON keys. 468 tests passing.

Add PostToolUse hook (hook post-tool-use): auto-formats JS/TS files using Biome or Prettier (walk-up detection from edited file), then runs tsc --noEmit --incremental filtered to the edited file. Biome preferred when both configs exist. execFileSync (not execSync) prevents shell injection. resolveLocalBin() checks node_modules/.bin/ before npx fallback. Graceful silent failure. Single subcommand handles both format and tsc check. additionalContext JSON output. 30-second timeout. Registered as 6th hook (fires on Edit|Write). findProjectConfig() merges findFormatterConfig() + findTsconfig() into single walk-up pass. 451 tests total (450 passing, 1 pre-existing flaky nanoid test).

Add PreCompact hook (hook pre-compact): saves a CompactionRecord (timestamp, trigger, debt, session count, bookmark count) to compaction_log[] in .sleep.json before Claude Code context compaction. LIFO, capped at 20 entries. New CompactionRecord interface and compaction_log field added to SleepState. Registered as 7th hook in install-skill (5-second timeout). SKILL.md frontmatter updated with 7 hooks total.

Refactor ensureHooks() from 160 lines of copy-paste registration boilerplate to a data-driven HOOK_SPECS table + 15-line loop. Adding a new hook is now a one-line change in HOOK_SPECS. Behavior unchanged.

Add Step 1c Pattern Extraction to rem-sleep agent protocol: after task linkage check, agent scans distilled transcripts for repeated user preferences (2+ occurrences), workflow patterns (3+ occurrences), recurring errors (2+ occurrences), and bookmark themes (3+ occurrences). Prompt-level only, no new CLI code needed.

Add UserPromptSubmit hook: fires on every user message and outputs a one-line sleep debt reminder when debt >= 4. Same thresholds as SessionStart directive (4/7/10/critical bookmarks) but compact single-line format. Critical bookmarks override debt threshold. Read-only (no state writes). Registered as the 5th hook in install-skill (SessionStart, Stop, SubagentStart, PreToolUse, UserPromptSubmit). SKILL.md YAML frontmatter updated with hook declaration; Sleep System docs expanded to cover persistent reminders. 6 new integration tests (415 total, all passing).

Tighten sleep debt consolidation thresholds: debt >= 4 now triggers reminder directives (was >= 7). Rhythm check changed from 5+ to 3+ sessions since last sleep. SKILL.md mandatory language: Drowsy (4-6) MUST offer consolidation after any task, Sleepy (7-9) MUST inform user at session start. 409 tests passing.

Add tasks list command: default excludes completed tasks, --all shows all statuses, --status <status> filters by specific status. Colored output (in_progress=yellow, completed=green). Consistent with bookmark list and trigger list patterns. 4 new integration tests added (407 total).

Fix 3 sources of wasted tool calls when querying active tasks: (1) added 'answer which tasks are active? directly from this, zero tool calls needed' to Auto-Loaded Context section, (2) added bold paragraph to Task Protocol reminding agents to answer from auto-loaded snapshot before using CLI, (3) replaced Glob _dream_context/state/*.md with dreamcontext tasks list in Discovery section. Command Reference table updated with tasks list [-s status] [--all] row.

Context-aware sub-agent optimization: PreToolUse hook blocks default Explorer when _dream_context/ exists, redirecting to dreamcontext-explore agent. Custom Explorer checks context files first (data structures, tech stack, features, knowledge), returns immediately if context answers query, falls back to full codebase search only if needed. SubagentStart briefing adds Task Awareness section (plan-to-task workflow) for all sub-agents. REM sleep agent updated with mandatory task linkage check. SKILL.md: PreToolUse hook in YAML, Rules 9-11, Sub-Agents section updated. 9 new integration tests (403 total).

Add consolidated_at (ISO timestamp) and session_ids (string[]) to SleepHistoryEntry. sleep done now records which sessions were processed. Backward compatible — old entries without these fields remain valid. 7 new tests added (394 total).

transcript distill now auto-filters by consolidated_at from sleep history: if a session was previously consolidated, only shows content after that timestamp. --full flag shows entire transcript. --since <iso> for manual cutoff. Entries without timestamps pass through. Prevents re-reading already-processed content in multi-cycle sessions.

transcript distill: include thinking blocks, show full content without truncation, include trivial responses, show subagent I/O (input+output, not internal tool calls), show byte deltas on Edit changes and line count on Write. Commit 443b944.

Replaced 'Context Propagation' paragraph in Sub-Agents section: now explicitly instructs main agent to match user request keywords against feature tags/names and include specific _dream_context/ file paths in Explore/Plan sub-agent prompts. Root cause: the old paragraph said 'You do not need to repeat context when delegating to sub-agents', actively discouraging context propagation.

Strengthened SubagentStart briefing directive from IMPORTANT to MANDATORY, named specific tools (Glob, Grep), added actionable decision rule ('If any feature name or tag matches your task, Read that feature file first'). Feature format cleaned up: tags on own line, status removed to keep read path prominent. 3 integration tests updated.

Implement neuroscience-inspired memory system (8 phases): bookmarks (awake ripples, salience-scored), knowledge decay tracking with staleness indicators, consolidation rhythm advisory at 5+ sessions, warm knowledge tier in snapshot (7-day recency + tag-overlap heuristic), contextual triggers with auto-expiry, transcript distillation (pure Node.js structural JSONL filter), sleep history (SleepHistoryEntry, sleep_history[] LIFO), and system flow core file (core/6.system_flow.md). New commands: bookmark add/list/clear, trigger add/list/remove, transcript distill, knowledge touch, sleep history. Fixed freshDefaults() shared-reference bug in readSleepState. 48 new tests (384 total, 383 passing).

Enhance Kanban task filters: added status filter dropdown, text search (searches name + description), and date range filter with field selector (created_at/updated_at). Filter state persisted via usePersistedState hook (localStorage prefix: dreamcontext:). Clear Filters button with active-count badge. FilterState interface exported from TaskFilters.tsx; applyFilters() in KanbanBoard.tsx handles all filter logic.

Fix selectedTask stale snapshot bug in KanbanBoard. Replaced storing a full Task object in React state with storing selectedSlug (string | null) and deriving the task via useMemo from live TanStack Query data. Detail panel now reflects post-mutation state automatically. 325 tests passing.

Polish dashboard UI: animated radial brand gradient background with subtle-pulse animation, stagger entrance animations for Kanban columns (slide-up-fade with cubic-bezier spring), CSS refinements across Header, Sidebar, Shell, KanbanColumn, TaskCard, TaskCreateModal, TaskDetailPanel, TaskFilters, CorePage, FeaturesPage, SleepPage, tokens. 325 tests passing.

Build release discovery system: src/lib/release-discovery.ts auto-discovers unreleased tasks, features, and changelog entries. New CLI commands: releases add --yes (non-interactive, auto-includes all unreleased items), releases list, releases show. 3 new API routes (GET /api/releases/unreleased, GET /api/releases/:version, POST /api/releases). release-backpopulate.ts sets released_version on features. Snapshot shows Latest Release section (changelog limit lowered from 5 to 3). 13 unit + 10 integration tests added; 325 total passing.

Update README and DEEP-DIVE: added Dashboard nav link, interactive mode mention, expanded Mermaid lifecycle diagram (features/changelog/releases in store, dashboard in capture), full Dashboard section with usage and design notes, releases add --yes and releases list/show commands, release auto-discovery explanation, Dashboard command subsection, SubagentStart briefing in hook flow diagram.

Enrich SubagentStart briefing with full project structure context. Briefing now includes: system structure explanation (soul/user/memory/extended/features purpose), extended core files index, features listing (name, status, why snippet, related tasks), knowledge index, and prioritized usage instructions ('Check feature PRDs first'). 4 new tests; 301 tests passing.

Add SQL ER diagram preview for 5.data_structures.sql in core file viewer. sql-parser.ts extracts entities, fields (enum/array/boolean/nullable/date type inference), and FK relationships from CREATE TABLE and comment-based schemas. SqlPreview.tsx renders entity cards in CSS grid with SVG bezier curves and arrowheads. CorePage.tsx shows File/Preview tab toggle for SQL files; Preview is default.

Add field-level change tracking to change-tracker.ts. FieldChange interface with from/to values added to DashboardChange. Net-change detection: A->B->A entries cancelled (removed), A->B->C folded to A->C. Append-only actions and entries without fields bypass detection. Routes (tasks, knowledge, core, sleep) now capture old values before mutation. 19 new unit tests.

Add comprehensive error handling: ErrorBoundary class component in App.tsx, res.ok checks before res.json() in API client, isError states on all 5 pages, mutation error feedback with 5s auto-dismiss in TaskDetailPanel, isPending disables insert/changelog buttons. Server hardening: 1MB body size limit with req.destroy() on overflow, graceful shutdown on SIGINT/SIGTERM with 5s force-exit, 30s socket timeout. 274 tests passing.

Fix race condition in sleep done where parallel sessions finishing during consolidation lost their records. Implemented epoch-based filtering: sleep_started_at timestamp added to SleepState, new sleep start command records epoch, sleep done only clears sessions/changes from before the epoch. Post-epoch records survive for the next consolidation cycle. Backward compatible when sleep start is not called.

Make tasks create fully non-interactive. --description defaults to task name, --priority defaults to medium. New --status flag (todo/in_progress/completed, default todo) and --tags flag (comma-separated). Invalid status values produce a validation error. Agents can now create tasks without interactive prompts blocking execution.

Fix inquirer highlight styling bug where the full menu line was colored instead of only the item name. Root cause: style.highlight receives '  ' + name (cursor + space prefix), so Map key lookups failed silently. Fix: slice(2) strips the 2-char prefix before lookup, result wrapped with chalk.bgHex('#581C87') background fill. Focused items now show purple background fill; unfocused show category-colored label.

Rewrite closed memory section: no longer claims agents cannot see/edit platform memory. Now frames friction as the real lock-in: platform dependency grows over time, workarounds exist but should not be necessary. Added bold punchline formatting throughout for scannability.

Add 'dreamcontext dashboard' command. Node.js native HTTP server (zero new runtime deps) with 17 REST API endpoints covering tasks, sleep, core, knowledge, features, changelog, and health. React 19 + Vite 6 SPA with Kanban board (drag-drop, filter, sort, group), task CRUD, sleep state page, core file editor with markdown preview, knowledge manager with pin/unpin, and features PRD viewer. Design system: purple-magenta brand tokens (#641787 to #db04b4), Visby CF font, 4px grid, light/dark mode, i18n-ready (English). Change tracker records every mutating API call to .sleep.json dashboard_changes, cleared on sleep done. Build: npm run build = build:dashboard (Vite) + build:cli (tsup); tsup copies dashboard/dist to dist/dashboard. SleepState extended with dashboard_changes field. 258 tests passing.

Add SubagentStart hook support. 'hook subagent-start' outputs JSON with hookSpecificOutput.additionalContext containing a lightweight context briefing (~25 lines) for sub-agents: project summary (120 char cap), directory structure, active tasks, knowledge index, pinned knowledge, and usage instructions. generateSubagentBriefing() added to snapshot.ts with shared getActiveTaskLines() helper. install-skill registers SubagentStart hook in .claude/settings.json (no matcher, fires for all sub-agents including our own, 5s timeout). SubagentStart JSON format differs from SessionStart plain text output. Briefing deliberately excludes soul/user/memory, sleep state, changelog, features detail. 10 new integration tests; 246 tests passing.

Remove coderegistry command entirely. Deleted src/cli/commands/coderegistry.ts and src/templates/init/6.code_registry.json. Removed all references from index.ts, interactive.ts, init.ts. Rationale: static code registries go stale immediately when methods are renamed or moved; native Grep/Glob tools serve discovery better. Commands: 10 to 9. Tests: 246 passing.

Enrich features section of snapshot with Why, related_tasks, and latest changelog entry per feature. Reads ## Why markdown section (first non-placeholder line, capped 120 chars), surfaces related_tasks from frontmatter, shows most recent non-creation changelog entry. Uses existing readSection from src/lib/markdown.ts. 2 integration tests added (225 total).

Add hook-based sleep debt auto-tracking. 'hook stop' records session_id and transcript_path to .sleep.json (Stop hook). 'hook session-start' replaces raw 'dreamcontext snapshot': analyzes previous session transcript for Write/Edit tool uses, auto-scores debt (1-3 changes +1, 4-8 +2, 9+ +3), injects graduated consolidation directives (debt 7-9 suggestion, debt 10+ critical block), then outputs snapshot. SleepState extended with last_session_id and last_transcript_path. Spread-merge backward compat for old .sleep.json. install-skill migrates existing SessionStart hooks. 50MB transcript cap. 31 new tests (221 total passing).

Add Smart Snapshot: knowledge index section surfaces slug + description + tags for every knowledge file (buildKnowledgeIndex in src/lib/knowledge-index.ts). Pinned knowledge files (pinned: true frontmatter) get full content loaded — zero agent tool calls. Extended core files index section surfaces names/types of core/[3-9]* files. Knowledge files are no longer invisible after write.

Add `dreamcontext knowledge index` subcommand with --tag filter and --plain output mode. Add `dreamcontext knowledge tags` subcommand listing 12 standard tags. Add pinned field to knowledge create and template. Standard tags: architecture, api, frontend, backend, database, devops, security, testing, design, decisions, onboarding, domain.

Add persistent sleep state tracking via `dreamcontext sleep` command (status, add, done, debt subcommands). Sleep state stored in state/.sleep.json and surfaced in snapshot output between Active Tasks and Recent Changelog. Includes readJsonObject/writeJsonObject utilities in json-file.ts.

Strip list/read/search/update subcommands from core, tasks, features, knowledge, and coderegistry. Agents use native Read/Edit/Write tools for direct file access; CLI is reserved for structural operations only. Test count reduced from 203 to 162 (all passing).
Rewrote README with true motivation (token-burning search spiral), brain-region mapping, RemSleep lifecycle diagram, and why existing solutions break
